findings.description: Source h2 section 'パフォーマンスログの出力方法' contains an h3 subsection 'パフォーマンスログの出力例' (underlined with ^^^), and the combined content exceeds 2000 characters. The knowledge file merges both into s3 without splitting. Per V3 rules, an h2 with ≥2000 chars that contains an h3 should be split into separate sections.
findings.source_evidence: RST h3: 'パフォーマンスログの出力例' (^^^^^^ underline), containing log.properties example, app-log.properties example, and actual log output line.
